events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a "shoe off its support" condition in hangers & supports for piping & plumbing. This is a defective installation condition where a pipe shoe (a support component that cradles the pipe) has come off or is not properly seated on its support. This is a clear defect that needs correction.

Let me build the JSON response.
